character_description:
This is my favourite character in Identity V. I love playing as Florian not only because he is cute and cool, but also because of his tragic backstory, which makes me sympathize with him. I also like his two-faced complexity and moral ambiguity, with his kindness and hidden darkness.
Anyway, who doesn't love a cute Fire Investigator? 🔥
about_me_intro: Hi! I'm uJayden, I am a Hong Konger and a university student studying LSGI. I've been playing Identity V for several years from 2018 to now. I am not a professional player that in a top tier of ranking, but I enjoy the game and playing my favourite character, Florian Brand.
about_me_gaming: When I'm not playing Identity V, I will do something related to programming, such as coding and maintaining my website, even I am a LSGI student. I also play some games such as Honkai Star Rail, Cities Skylines, Minecraft, Oxygen Not Included and The Sims 4. I look forward to a friendly discussion about IdentityV! About CP: I don't ship nor oppose any CP.
where_am_i_description: I am a Hong Konger, so of course I am in Hong Kong right now.
faq_add_friend_q: Can I add your friend in the game?
faq_add_friend_a: Yes, sure! Please add your reason in the friend request message so that I know who you are.
faq_update_profile_q: How often do you update this profile?
faq_update_profile_a: I usually update this profile every 1-3 months, depending on my time schedule and how much my stats change.
faq_add_social_q: Can I add your friend on Discord / Instagram?
faq_add_social_a: Not suggested (until we get to know each other better).
faq_reply_time_q: How long do you need to reply to my messages?
faq_reply_time_a1: It depends on my time schedule. Usually I will reply within a few hours, but sometimes it may take longer.
faq_reply_time_a2: Please don't frustrate if I don't reply immediately, I may be busy with my studies or other things. OvO
